name: mysql-storage-migration-plan
title: Next-stage MySQL runtime storage and targeted migration
description: 把 MySQL 作为下一阶段正式运行时数据存储方案，补齐从旧 JSON/file runtime stores 到 MySQL/SQLAlchemy 表的定向迁移，不新增缓存/文件型权威存储。
creator: lijin
notes: Implemented targeted JSON/file runtime to SQLAlchemy/MySQL migration with --output-root, FABLEMAP_DATABASE_URL priority, idempotent upsert/backfill, side-store coverage and backend tests. Validation: compileall backend/src; full backend pytest 249 passed.
